options.content:
### Cluster Provisioning SLO - Fleet Wide

Fleet-wide view of HCP cluster provisioning health from backend create-operation and cluster provisioning-state metrics.

**SLO targets**
- `Success SLO: Successful Creates` target is **95%** successful completed creates in the selected lookback window.
- `Timeliness SLO: Successful Creates Within 20m` target is **95%** of successful creates completing within 20 minutes.
- Create latency target is **p95 within 20 minutes** for successful creates.

**How the time range works**
- The dashboard time picker is the lookback window (default `last 24 hours`).
- `Completed`, `Successful`, `Failed / Canceled`, `Success SLO`, `Timeliness SLO`, and `Create Duration p50/p95/p99` use cluster `operation_type=create` attempts that reached a terminal phase within the selected window.
- `Successful` means `phase="succeeded"`; `Failed / Canceled` means `phase=~"failed|canceled"`.
- `24h` is the normal default; `7d` is the practical upper bound for the current retained operation history.

**Top-level panels**
- The top summary rows show fleet size, completed attempts, failed/canceled attempts, fleet-weighted success and timeliness SLOs, and create-duration percentiles.
- `Clusters by Provisioning State` shows the current cluster fleet mix over time.
- `Create Ops Stuck > 20 min` highlights in-flight create operations that may be hung.
- `Subscription Breakdown` highlights where failed or canceled attempts are concentrated.
- `Detail Tables` provides the exact terminal and active create operations behind the summary panels.

**Datasource**
- Select a single service-cluster Prometheus datasource from the top bar, or choose `All` to fan out across all matching service-cluster datasources.
- Top-level fleet SLO panels sum raw counts across the selected datasources before calculating ratios.
- Metrics come from backend service clusters (`Managed_Prometheus_services-*`).

panels.description: Total number of living clusters in the fleet

targets.expr: count(backend_cluster_created_time_seconds) or vector(0)

panels.title: Total Fleet Size

panels.description: Terminal cluster create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window. This is the denominator for the lookback SLO panels.

targets.expr: count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"succeeded|failed|canceled"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"succeeded|failed|canceled"}) < $__range_s)) or vector(0)

panels.title: Completed Create Attempts (Window)

panels.description: Fleet-weighted Success SLO: successful terminal create attempts divided by all terminal create attempts across the selected service-cluster datasources.

targets.expr: count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < $__range_s)) * 100

count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"succeeded|failed|canceled"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"succeeded|failed|canceled"}) < $__range_s))

panels.title: Success SLO: Successful Creates

panels.description: Failed or canceled cluster create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window. Any non-zero value means there were unsuccessful creates in the window.

targets.expr: count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"failed|canceled"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"failed|canceled"}) < $__range_s)) or vector(0)

panels.title: Failed / Canceled Create Attempts (Window)

panels.description: Fleet-weighted Timeliness SLO: successful creates under 20 minutes divided by all successful creates across the selected service-cluster datasources.

targets.expr: count((((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < 1200) and (backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < $__range_s))) * 100

count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < $__range_s))

panels.title: Timeliness SLO: Successful Creates Within 20m

panels.description: Fleet p50 create duration in minutes for successful create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window.

targets.expr: ((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) / 60) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < $__range_s)

panels.title: Create Duration p50 (min)

panels.description: Fleet p95 create duration in minutes for successful create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window.

targets.expr: ((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) / 60) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < $__range_s)

panels.title: Create Duration p95 (min)

panels.description: Fleet p99 create duration in minutes for successful create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window.

targets.expr: ((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) / 60) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < $__range_s)

panels.title: Create Duration p99 (min)

panels.description: Distribution of clusters across all provisioning states over time.

targets.expr: count by (phase) (backend_cluster_provision_state == 1)

panels.title: Clusters by Provisioning State

panels.description: Number of create operations stuck in a non-terminal phase (accepted, awaitingsecret, provisioning, updating, deleting) for more than 20 minutes, summed across the selected service-cluster datasources. Target: 0. Indicates operations that may be hung.

targets.expr: count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"accepted|awaitingsecret|provisioning|updating|deleting"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"accepted|awaitingsecret|provisioning|updating|deleting"}) > 1200)) or vector(0)

panels.title: Create Ops Stuck > 20 min

panels.description: Failed or canceled create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window, grouped by subscription and summed across the selected service-cluster datasources.

targets.expr: count by (subscription_id) ((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"failed|canceled"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"failed|canceled"}) < $__range_s))

panels.title: Failed / Canceled Attempts by Subscription (Window)

panels.description: Terminal cluster create attempts that completed within the selected dashboard time window. Shows resource ID, subscription, and terminal phase.

targets.expr: (backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"succeeded|failed|canceled"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"succeeded|failed|canceled"}) < $__range_s)

panels.title: Terminal Create Attempts (Window)

panels.description: All active create operations across the fleet. Shows resource ID, subscription, and current phase.

targets.expr: backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase=~"accepted|awaitingsecret|provisioning|updating|deleting"} == 1

panels.title: Active Create Operations (Details)

panels.description: Rolling 1h successful create duration percentiles. With datasource=All, each selected service-cluster datasource computes its own percentiles; use the top-level duration stat panels for the fleet snapshot. Red line = 20m SLO target.

targets.expr: quantile(0.50, ((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) / 60) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < 3600)) or vector(0)

quantile(0.90, ((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) / 60) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < 3600)) or vector(0)

quantile(0.99, ((backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} - backend_resource_operation_start_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) / 60) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < 3600)) or vector(0)

panels.title: Create Duration by Service Cluster (Rolling 1h)

panels.description: Rolling 1h: failed / (succeeded + failed), with canceled operations excluded. With datasource=All, each selected service-cluster datasource computes its own ratio; use top-level panels for fleet reporting.

targets.expr: ((count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="failed"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="failed"}) < 3600)) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(((count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="succeeded"}) < 3600)) or vector(0)) + (count((backend_resource_operation_phase_info{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="failed"} == 1) and ((time() - backend_resource_operation_last_transition_time_seconds{resource_type="microsoft.redhatopenshift/hcpopenshiftclusters", operation_type="create", phase="failed"}) < 3600)) or vector(0))), 1)) * 100

panels.title: Failure Ratio by Service Cluster (Rolling 1h)

panels.description: Distribution of cluster ages in the fleet

targets.expr: (time() - backend_cluster_created_time_seconds) / 86400

panels.title: Fleet Cluster Age Distribution
